subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-Qabli-Ridá, upon thee be the glory of God, the Lord of all mankind. Thy letter that was addressed to Áqá Muhammad [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قبل رضا علیک بهاء الله مولی الوری نامه آن جناب که به آقا محمد علیه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance
